mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(user_id) FROM fans WHERE fan_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(user_id) FROM fans WHERE attention_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM fans WHERE attention_id = #{attentionId} AND fan_id = #{fanId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fans WHERE attention_id = #{attentionId} AND fan_id = #{fanId}
select * from fans where attention_id = #{attentionId} and user_id = #{userIdFromToken}
select * from fans where user_id = #{userIdFromToken} and attention_id = #{userId}
select * from fans where fan_id = #{userIdFromToken} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: delete from fans where attention_id = #{userId} and user_id = #{userIdFromToken}
delete from fans where fan_id = #{userIdFromToken} and user_id = #{userId}
